info.name: EGYAKIN V3 — AI APIs
info.description:
All AI-related endpoints introduced or modified in API V3.

**AI Endpoints covered:**
1. `POST /api/v3/ai-form/process-section` — AI form extraction (audio OR images)
2. `POST /api/v3/AIconsultation/{patientId}` — Send AI consultation for a patient
3. `GET  /api/v3/AIconsultation-history/{patientId}` — Get AI consultation history
4. `GET  /api/v3/questions/{section_id}` — V3 questions (includes `ai_mode` + `ai_hint`)
5. `GET  /api/v3/patient/{section_id}/{patient_id}` — V3 patient section answers (includes `ai_mode` + `ai_hint`)
6. `GET  /api/v3/showSections/{patient_id}` — V3 show sections (includes `ai_mode` + `ai_hint`)

**Auth:** Bearer token via `{{token}}` variable. Set it after login.

variable.description: Sanctum bearer token — set after login

request.description: Login and auto-save the token to `{{token}}` collection variable.

item.name: AI Form — Process Section
item.description:
POST /api/v3/ai-form/process-section

Extracts structured form data from a voice recording OR 1–5 lab/radiology images.
- Send EITHER `audio` OR `images[]` — never both.
- `section_id` must exist in sections_infos table.
- Mock mode: set AI_FORM_MOCK=true in .env to skip real OpenAI calls.

formdata.description: Audio file: mp3, wav, m4a, ogg, or webm. Max 25MB.
ID of the section to extract data for (must exist in DB)

request.description:
Transcribes the audio using OpenAI Whisper, then extracts structured answers for all questions in the given section.

**Expected response:**
```json
{
  "value": true,
  "input_type": "audio",
  "extracted_text": "Male patient, aged 64...",
  "data": [
    {
      "id": 1,
      "question": "Patient Name",
      "type": "string",
      "answer": "Ahmed Mohamed",
      ...
    }
  ]
}
```

formdata.description: Lab report image: jpg, jpeg, png, or webp. Max 20MB per file.

request.description:
Analyzes a single lab report image using GPT-4o Vision, then extracts structured answers.

**Expected response:**
```json
{
  "value": true,
  "input_type": "image",
  "image_count": 1,
  "extracted_text": "Creatinine: 3.2, pH: 7.30...",
  "data": [...]
}
```

formdata.description: Section 6 = Lab & Radiology results — good match for image input

request.description:
Send 2–5 images in a single call. GPT-4o reads all images together and extracts a combined result.

**Expected response:**
```json
{
  "value": true,
  "input_type": "image",
  "image_count": 2,
  "extracted_text": "...",
  "data": [...]
}
```

formdata.description: PDF lab report. Max 20MB. PDFs are uploaded to OpenAI Files API, referenced, then deleted.

request.description: Upload a PDF lab report. Internally, the PDF is uploaded to OpenAI Files API, used in a GPT-4o call, then immediately deleted.

item.name: Error — Audio and images sent together

formdata.description: Image file (should be rejected — can't send both)

request.description: **Expected 422:** You can upload a maximum of 5 images per request.
**Expected 401:** No bearer token provided.

item.name: AI Consultation (ChatGPT)

request.description:
Sends the full patient dataset (all answered questions across all sections) to ChatGPT and returns a structured clinical consultation.

**Authorization:**
- Only the patient's owning doctor or an admin can trigger this.
- Each doctor has 3 monthly trials. Each successful call decrements `trial_count`.

**Expected 200:**
```json
{
  "value": true,
  "message": "Consultation request sent successfully",
  "response": "Based on the patient data...",
  "trial_count": 2
}
```

item.name: Send AI Consultation — No trials left

request.description:
Call after exhausting all 3 monthly trials.

**Expected 403:**
```json
{
  "value": false,
  "message": "No trials left for this month"
}
```

item.name: Send AI Consultation — Not patient owner

request.description:
Login as a different doctor (not the patient owner, not admin) and attempt to consult.

**Expected 403:**
```json
{
  "value": false,
  "message": "..."
}
```

item.name: Send AI Consultation — Patient not found

request.description:
**Expected 404:**
```json
{
  "value": false,
  "message": "Patient not found"
}
```

Returns paginated consultation history (5 per page, newest first) for a patient.
Also returns the doctor's current `trial_count` and `reset_date`.

**Expected 200:**
```json
{
  "value": true,
  "message": "Consultation history retrieved successfully",
  "trial_count": 2,
  "reset_date": "2026-05-19T00:00:00.000000Z",
  "history": {
    "data": [
      {
        "id": 1,
        "doctor_id": 5,
        "patient_id": 1,
        "response": "Based on the patient data...",
        "created_at": "2026-04-19T..."
      }
    ],
    "current_page": 1,
    "total": 1
  }
}
```

item.name: Get AI Consultation History — Patient not found

request.description:
**Expected 404:**
```json
{
  "value": false,
  "message": "Patient not found"
}
```
**Expected 401:** No bearer token.

item.name: V3 Questions (ai_mode + ai_hint)
item.description:
GET /api/v3/questions/{section_id}

V3 enhances the questions response by injecting `ai_mode` and `ai_hint` from the section's record. These fields tell the client which AI input mode is available for this section (audio, image, or none).

item.name: Get Questions for Section — with ai_mode

request.description:
Returns all questions for a section, with the V3-added `ai_mode` and `ai_hint` fields at the top level.

**Expected 200:**
```json
{
  "value": true,
  "ai_mode": "audio",
  "ai_hint": "Dictate the patient demographic data",
  "data": [
    {
      "id": 1,
      "question": "Patient Name",
      "type": "string",
      ...
    }
  ]
}
```

**Note:** `ai_mode` and `ai_hint` are `null` if the section does not have AI configured.

item.name: Get Questions — Section with ai_mode = null

request.description:
Section that has no AI mode configured.

**Expected 200:**
```json
{
  "value": true,
  "ai_mode": null,
  "ai_hint": null,
  "data": [...]
}
```
Returns questions with the patient's existing answers populated. Delegates to V1 controller (no ai_mode injection on this sub-route).

Section ID does not exist.

**Expected:** `ai_mode: null`, `ai_hint: null`, empty or 404 data depending on V1 behavior.

item.name: V3 Patient Section (ai_mode + ai_hint)
item.description:
GET /api/v3/patient/{section_id}/{patient_id}

V3 enhances the patient section answers response with `ai_mode` and `ai_hint` from the section.

item.name: Get Patient Section Answers — with ai_mode

request.description:
Returns all questions for a section with the patient's saved answers, plus the V3 `ai_mode` and `ai_hint` fields.

**Expected 200:**
```json
{
  "value": true,
  "ai_mode": "image",
  "ai_hint": "Upload lab report images",
  "data": [
    {
      "id": 71,
      "question": "Creatinine on admission",
      "type": "string",
      "answer": "3.2",
      ...
    }
  ]
}
```

item.name: Get Patient Section Answers — Patient not found

request.description:
Patient does not exist.

**Expected 404/error response from V1 handler.**

item.name: V3 Show Sections
item.description:
GET /api/v3/showSections/{patient_id}

Returns all sections for a patient. V3 delegates to the V1 `showSectionsV1` method. Sections include `ai_mode` and `ai_hint` if set.

request.description: **Expected 404/error from V1 handler.**

item.name: Submit Patient Section (V3)
item.description:
PUT /api/v3/submitStatus/{patient_id}

Final submit for a patient's section. Delegates to V3 SectionsController → V1 updateFinalSubmit.

request.description: Marks a section as submitted/completed for the given patient.
